item.title: Total Nutrition Inc. Expands Recall of Moringa Capsules Because of Possible Health Risk
item.description: Total Nutrition Inc. of Deer Park, NY is voluntarily expanding its recall of Moringa Capsules due to the potential to be contaminated with Salmonella.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Champion Foods Recalls Some Batches of Motor City Pizza Co. 5 Cheese Bread Because of Possible Health Risk
item.description: Champion Foods LLC of New Boston, Michigan, is voluntarily recalling certain batches of Motor City Pizza Co. 5 Cheese Bread because they have the potential to be contaminated with Salmonella.
item.dc:creator: FDA
